title: PayrollCaptureRequest v1
description: Input envelope to a source-portal capture Service Task. Built by the BPM and consumed by the agent-worker capture adapter. Capture jobs are typically parameter-driven (envelope + task identify what to fetch); the optional request body carries portal-specific overrides when needed.

request.description: Optional capture-side body. null/omitted when the envelope+task are sufficient (most cases). Object for portal-specific overrides; vault:vN:... when encrypted.
